content.title: AI Priority Scoring Engine

userStory.iWant: tasks to be automatically scored and ranked by priority
userStory.soThat: the team always works on the most impactful items first

acceptanceCriteria.then: new tasks receive a priority score within 2 seconds of creation

acceptanceCriteria.given: a task's deadline or dependencies change
acceptanceCriteria.then: the priority score updates within 5 seconds
it falls back to rule-based scoring using deadline, dependency count, and manual priority

implementationDetails: Feature extraction pipeline: deadline proximity, dependency count, label embeddings, historical completion rate
OpenAI API for natural language priority inference on task descriptions
Response caching layer with 5-minute TTL to handle API rate limits
content.notes: Golden dataset of 200 manually-prioritized tasks available from beta testers.
